refund_policy.title: Refund Policy
content: Refunds are allowed within 7 days of purchase.
Proof of payment is required for all refund requests.
Refund is not allowed if the product has been opened or used, unless the item is defective.
If the product is defective, refund may be approved within 30 days of purchase.

exchange_policy.title: Exchange Policy
content: Exchange is allowed within 14 days of purchase.
Only unopened and unused products can be exchanged, unless the product is defective.
Customers must provide an order number or proof of purchase.
Exchange for defective products may be approved within 30 days.

delivery_policy.title: Delivery Policy
content: Standard delivery takes 2 to 5 business days after payment confirmation.
Remote areas may require additional 2 business days.
If the order status is marked as shipped, delivery cannot be canceled through customer service and must follow the return policy after delivery.
Customers can track delivery using the tracking number.

membership_policy.title: Membership Policy
content: Membership benefits are activated after account verification.
Membership points are earned only for completed purchases.
Membership grade is updated once per month based on the previous month's purchase amount.
Points cannot be transferred to another account.

cancel_policy.title: Cancellation Policy
content: Orders can be canceled only before shipment confirmation.
If payment is completed but shipment has not started, cancellation is allowed.
If the order has already been shipped, cancellation is not allowed and the customer must request a return after delivery.
Promotional coupon benefits used for the canceled order may be withdrawn after cancellation.
